Vessel Description

The MCY 66 from Monte Carlo Yachts is a 20.11-meter luxury yacht. This yacht stands out for its iconic design and recognizable profile, enhanced by innovative elements and evolving craftsmanship. It offers incredible interior spaces, with additional portholes at the bow for increased exposure to natural light.

Seller Information

Affiniti Yacht Brokerage

Affiniti Yacht Brokerage is a team of yacht brokers specializing in vessels for discerning clients. From hundreds of transactions over our 30 years, Affiniti has earned a strong reputation for exceptional personalized service and integrity. Whether you are a buyer or a seller, our clients benefit from our uniquely qualified team with unparalleled knowledge of the marine marketplace. We make it a point to deeply understand the preferences of our clients coupled with a thorough understanding of available boats, so that we can recommend the best option to match your lifestyle, boating preferences and budget. Conveniently located in the heart of South Florida, just inside the Hillsboro Inlet, Affiniti Yacht Brokerage serves clients from all over the United States and beyond. Whether you are buying or selling, in the market for luxury recreational or commercial vessels, Affiniti has an unmatched staff of specialists who not only share a passion for boating but also a deeply grounded knowledge of boat construction and maintenance.  Beyond our proven expertise in evaluating available inventory and negotiating pricing, we are intimately involved in every phase of the transaction, working on your behalf. Our service includes working closely with our client and their certified marine surveyors, helping to understand complex systems and being physically present at any mechanical and hull surveys. This gives our clients the assurance that they are fully informed with complete transparency and are receiving the highest standard of products and service. We believe the cornerstone of our success lies in our motto, “Treat people the way you would want to be treated.”

(954) 943-1722Delray Beach, FL 33445
